text:
Created attachment 242676
diff file for update to 1.32.4.7164

multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.32.4.7164

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/585

    NEW:
     (Web) Updated to 4.108.0

    FIXES:
     (Analysis) Processing an invalid audio file could
      result in the scanner stalling while producing very
      large amounts of log data.
     (Bandwidth) Very low WAN bandwidth streams could get
      starved.
     (Collections) Refreshing item counts for smart
      collections could block other operations during
      startup.
     (Library) Advanced Filter for Editions returning
      unexpected results.
     (Library) Items with EPG data could sometimes lose
      certain metadata fields.
     (Transcoder) Hardware transcoding could fail to be
      used on older Intel GPUs on Linux.

  QA:

   portlint OK (0 fatal error)
